name: analyst-kit
description: Analyst Kit — installable equity-research skills for Claude Code, Codex, and other agent runtimes.

scripts.validate:release: npm run validate && npm run check:registry && npm run test:analyst-kit-core
scripts.container:terminal: id=$(docker ps -q --filter label=devcontainer.local_folder="$PWD" | head -1); if [ -z "$id" ]; then echo 'No running devcontainer for this folder — run: devcontainer up --workspace-folder .'; exit 1; fi; docker exec -it -w "/workspaces/$(basename "$PWD")" "$id" bash

author: Mohit Kumar
